name: functionality_wiring_run_live_ui_sweep
desc: Live UI toggle sweep — for every Phase-8 fixed item, press the UI control via ui_toggle_assert_wire and confirm the expected C# wire fires. Surfaces each press in the error panel as a WireRecoverable timeline entry. Skipped items are reported as 'requires_live_revit'.

parameters.name: agent
parameters.description: Optional: limit sweep to a single agent's items (e.g. 01).

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: If true, walk the item list without invoking presses (still surfaces would-press timeline). Default false.
